description_long: This is a Sony DualShock 3 wireless game controller, commonly used with the PlayStation 3 console. The controller features a matte black plastic body with two ergonomic hand grips, two analog sticks, a directional pad, and four iconic PlayStation face buttons (triangle, circle, cross, square) on the right. The top surface includes a central PlayStation button, 'Start' and 'Select' buttons, and four LED indicators for player assignment. The front edge houses two pairs of shoulder buttons (L1/L2 and R1/R2) and a mini-USB charging port. The controller is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use, with all controls easily accessible for gaming.
description: A black Sony DualShock 3 wireless game controller with analog sticks, face buttons, and shoulder triggers, designed for handheld gaming.
description_view_0: Front view showing the analog sticks, D-pad, face buttons, and ergonomic hand grips.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right grip, face buttons, and shoulder triggers.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the shoulder buttons, USB port, LED indicators, and branding.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, showing the D-pad, left grip, and shoulder triggers.
